overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy action game showing an armored hunter character exploring a dark, foggy cave system. The character exits a rocky cavern into a misty cliffside area, passes a mounted NPC, and continues toward another cave entrance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dark rocky cave corridor toward distant exit

notable_agents.action: small cat-like companion (Palico) following closely behind the character

entered.detail: dark jagged rock wall forming the left boundary of the cave passage
tall dark rock cliff face forming the right boundary
rocky overhang ceiling with uneven texture
large bright opening at the end of the cave passage showing sky beyond

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dark cave corridor with jagged rock walls on both sides. The Palico companion follows closely behind as they approach a bright exit opening in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave exit archway leading to misty exterior cliff

events.description: character exits the enclosed cave into open misty cliff area
ambient light shifts from dark cave interior to foggy exterior

agents.ego_description: walking through large cave archway into foggy open cliff area

notable_agents.action: Palico companion running alongside on the right

entered.detail: fog-filled chasm with low visibility and blue-gray atmosphere
faint yellow lights visible through the mist in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the cave through a large rocky archway into a foggy cliffside area. The cave walls recede into the distance as the misty valley and distant glowing lights become visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty cliff edge overlooking foggy valley

events.description: thick fog rolls in reducing visibility of the valley below
character turns slightly right to follow the cliff path

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along narrow cliff edge path in heavy fog

notable_agents.action: rider mounted on a large bird-like creature standing on the cliff edge

entered.detail: dark silhouette of rider on creature against the fog
jagged rock formations marking the edge of the cliff path

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow cliff edge path enveloped in thick fog. A mounted NPC on a large creature stands silhouetted on the right side of the path as the character passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky tunnel leading to inner cave chamber

events.description: character leaves open cliff and enters darker rocky tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking into darker cave tunnel toward light-filled exit

entered.detail: dark cave mouth with stalactites hanging from the ceiling
icicle-like rock formations hanging from cave ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the misty cliff behind and enters a darker rocky tunnel. Stalactites hang from the ceiling as the character approaches another cave opening with light visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a dark cavern, across a misty cliffside, and back into a rocky tunnel. It begins within a narrow, dark corridor of jagged rock where the character and their Palico companion move toward a bright exit. As they emerge through a large rocky archway, the enclosed walls recede to reveal a foggy cliffside valley dotted with distant glowing lights. The camera then follows the character along a narrow cliff edge enveloped in thick fog, passing a mounted NPC silhouetted against the mist. Finally, the scene shifts from the open air back into a darker rocky tunnel filled with hanging stalactites as the character approaches another distant light.
